titleStmt.title: Corpus parlementaire français ParlaMint-FR [ParlaMint.ana]
French parliamentary corpus ParlaMint-FR [ParlaMint.ana]
Comptes-rendus des débats en séance publique de l'Assemblée Nationale (2017 - 2022)
Proceedings of the debates in plenary sitting of the Assemblée Nationale (2017 - 2022)

respStmt.resp: Encodage du corpus selon ParlaMint TEI XML

funder.orgName: OSCARS (Open Science Clusters' Action for Research & Society)

availability.p: This work is licensed under the terms of the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License

bibl.title: Travaux parlementaires (Assemblée nationale)
Débats en séance publique - Comptes rendus au format XML

projectDesc.p: ParlaMint is a project that aims to (1) create a multilingual set of comparable corpora of parliamentary proceedings uniformly encoded according to the ParlaMint encoding guidelines, covering the period from 2015 to mid-2022; (2) add linguistic annotations to the corpora and machine-translate them to English; (3) make the corpora available through concordancers; and (4) build use cases in Political Sciences and Digital Humanities based on the corpus data.

correction.p: No correction of source texts was performed.

normalization.p: Text has not been normalised, except for removing non-breaking spaces.

hyphenation.p: No end-of-line hyphens were present in the source.

quotation.p: Quotation marks have been left in the text and are not explicitly marked up.

segmentation.p: The texts are segmented into utterances (speeches) and segments (corresponding to paragraphs in the source transcription).

prefixDef.p: Private URIs with this prefix point to elements giving their name. In this document they are simply local references into the UD-SYN taxonomy categories in the corpus root TEI header.
Private URIs with this prefix point to elements giving their name. In this document they are simply local references into the Topic taxonomy categories in the corpus root TEI header.
Private URIs with this prefix point to elements giving their name. In this document they are simply local references into the Sentiment taxonomy categories in the corpus root TEI header.

application.label: Stanza
application.desc: Stanza – A Python NLP Package for Many Human Languages, pretrained neural network model for French, available from https://github.com/stanfordnlp/stanza.

application.label: ParlaCAP
application.desc: Automatic annotation with CAP (Comparative Agendas Project) major topic labels, produced with the multilingual ParlaCAP classifier, available from https://huggingface.co/classla/ParlaCAP-Topic-Classifier.

application.label: ParlaSent
application.desc: Automatic annotation of sentence-level sentiment, produced with the multilingual ParlaSent classifier, available from https://huggingface.co/classla/xlm-r-parlasent.

revisionDesc.change: parlamint2release script: Fix some identifiable erros for the release.
Tomaž Erjavec: Include topic and sentiment related information.
parlamint2release script: Fix some identifiable erros for the release.
Giancarlo Luxardo: ParlaMint II update, vs 3.0.
